task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS region from an S3 bucket URL in the format 's3://bucket-name.region.amazonaws.com/key'. Return the region name.
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to all objects in an S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'.
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs, which follow the pattern 'i-' followed by 17 hexadecimal characters.
